**Rewritten Query (PII Removed):**  
I am dedicated, organized, and a leadership-oriented individual with 15+ years of experience in Medical Transcription and a strong understanding of medical terminology across various specialties. I have worked with physicians in fields such as Orthopedics, Cardiology, Gynecology, Psychiatry, Radiology, Internal Medicine, ENT, Family Medicine, Neurology, and Dermatology. I possess excellent interpersonal skills, am a team player, and am eager to learn and develop new skills. I am reliable, dependable, and consistently seek new responsibilities across different employment areas. A multi-tasker who excels in supervision, transcription, and customer relationship management, I regularly exceed productivity goals to contribute to organizational success.

· Ensured excellent accuracy with good speed and maintained TAT.
